summary: Core refresh orchestrator with Service struct managing fetch→store pipeline
side_effects: calls storage.Store methods to fetch channels and messages
calls Fetcher interface to fetch messages from sources
updates sync state checkpoints for incremental sync
notes: Central orchestrator matching hints. Service struct with 4 refresh methods. Implements two fetch strategies: (1) Direct Telegram via Fetcher interface with afterMsgID-based incremental sync, (2) Generic Source interface with checkpoint-based sync (RFC/RSS/HackerNews). Both strategies: fetch→dedup via UNIQUE constraint→store→update checkpoint. FetchedMessage and RefreshResult are key value types. Heavy storage coupling (Channels, Messages, SyncState collections).
